description: Chief of Staff orchestration rules — pipeline management, handoff validation, worker routing

hard_stops.logic: workspace must be initialized before orchestration can begin
cannot route to a worker the user does not have an active subscription for
Alex cannot override a specialist worker hard stop — if a specialist blocks, Alex must respect it

soft_flags.logic: pipeline has a step with no progress for more than 48 hours
handoff waiting for user approval for more than 24 hours
one or more tasks are past their due date
two or more workers produced conflicting results on the same deal
